Name: MajorBuildInvocations
Author: Major Technology
Description:
The **Major Build AI Invocations** solution for Microsoft Sentinel provides a CCF-based data connector that automatically ingests AI agent invocation records from the [Major Build](https://www.major.build) platform.

Each record captures:
- **Who** ran the AI agent (user name, email)
- **What** application and resource integration was used
- **What data** was accessed (including full SQL query text)
- **Whether** the invocation succeeded or failed
- **When** the invocation occurred and from which environment

This enables security teams to audit AI agent activity, detect anomalous access patterns, and investigate data exposure via AI agents.

**Data Connectors:** 1

**Table:** MajorBuildInvocations_CL

**Poll Interval:** Every 5 minutes
